name: Aneta Hristova
title: Frontend Developer
bio:
I'm a frontend developer who loves building functional and user-friendly web applications. 
I write clean code and focus on creating smooth digital experiences that simply work.
about: I'm a frontend developer based in Ulricehamn, Sverige. I enjoy turning complex problems into simple, beautiful interfaces. When I'm not coding, you'll find me exploring new technologies or solving coding challenges.
